title: Captain Blackjack
director: Julien Duvivier, José Antonio Nieves Conde
writer: Julien Duvivier, Robert Gaillard, Robert Gaillard
actors: George Sanders, Herbert Marshall, Patricia Roc
plot: Along the Spanish coast, American smuggler Mike Alexander comes into conflict with human-trafficker Captain Nicarescu and both of them are tracked by undercover Spanish police inspector Carnero.
